title: EnderZoo : Patched
description: A bug-patch for the popular 1.7.10 mod EnderZoo, made by CrazyPants.
body:
# An EnderZoo repost for 1.7.10 with some bug patches.

This mod is a repost of the popular mod **EnderZoo**, originaly made by **crazypants** back in the day.

The mod authors don't support 1.7.10 anymore, so I decided to take the code for adding new simple features and patch some bugs.

If you notice something odd, or want a new feature, feel free to ask !

## Patched bugs :
- Right-clicking with Withering Powder used to sent debug messages in the chat
## New features :
- Added a config entry for disabling enderminy initial long scream when it is stared at.
- Refactor code with modern syntax

## Licence and repost rights :
The original EnderZoo mod is licensed under **Creative Commons Zero**, and this allows me to take the code, rework, and release it for possible commercial use. I'm mainly doing it because the 1.7.10 version of EnderZoo is not supported anymore by it's developers. Original mod link : [**EnderZoo**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ender-zoo) | [**GitHub**](https://github.com/SleepyTrousers/EnderZoo)

# End of Modrinth support !
- The newest versions of the mod will only be available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thenemex/projects)
- These mods are essentially made for my modpack [**Thaumic Industries 2 - Expert**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumic-industries-2-expert), but I try my best to bring new features and config tweaks for everyone to enjoy !
